title: digitalis × velenovskyana
intro: Digitalis × velenovskyana is a hybrid plant species within the foxglove family (Digitalis), known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is used to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation and heart failure due to its ability to increase the strength of the heart's contractions and slow the heart rate. The health benefits of Digitalis × velenovskyana include improved cardiovascular health, increased energy, and reduced risk of stroke. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and extracted to create a medication that is often prescribed under the close supervision of a healthcare professional.
